title: Gigachad Meme Pack
description:
Gigachad Meme Resource Pack

This resource pack replaces several vanilla Minecraft elements with a Gigachad meme theme for a more fun and iconic experience.
body:
Gigachad Meme Resource Pack

This resource pack replaces several vanilla Minecraft elements with a Gigachad meme theme for a more fun and iconic experience.

Features:

Some vanilla paintings have been replaced with custom Gigachad meme artworks.

The Cat music disc has been replaced with “Can You Feel My Heart”.

The Cat music disc icon has been changed to match the Gigachad theme.

With a rare chance, the main menu music may also play “Can You Feel My Heart”.

Notes:

No mods required — works with vanilla Minecraft.

Simply enable the resource pack from the settings menu.

Designed to keep the original Minecraft feel while adding a strong meme vibe.

Enjoy decorating your world with Gigachad energy 🗿
